samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_pipe_8bit">
    <description>Unsigned 8-bit multiplier implemented with pipelining. Utilizes clock (clk), active-low reset (rst_n), input enable (mul_en_in), and outputs enable (mul_en_out) and product (mul_out).</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal for synchronization.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="mul_en_in">Input enable signal for multiplication operation.</input>
        <input id="mul_a" width_description="[7:0]">Multiplicand input with 8 bits.</input>
        <input id="mul_b" width_description="[7:0]">Multiplier input with 8 bits.</input>
        <output id="mul_en_out">Output enable signal indicating multiplication status.</output>
        <output id="mul_out" width_description="[15:0]">Product output with 16 bits.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Multiplies two 8-bit numbers using pipelined approach. Includes input control, input registers, partial product generation, partial sum calculation, final product calculation, and output assignment.</implementation>
</module>
